objects.description: Orange circle, 155px, centered with small white dot on edge
Small white dot on edge of circle

choreography.description: Circle rotates 180° clockwise while scaling from 100% to 150%. The white dot follows the edge of the circle.
Circle continues rotating another 180° (total 360°) while scaling back from 150% to 100%. The white dot completes a full rotation.
Circle performs a gentle rotation wobble ±15° twice. The white dot moves accordingly.
